ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "robot_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot */,
  "robot_type" TEXT /* Type of the robot (e.g., robotic arm, AGV) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the robot */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the robot */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the robot was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the robot is installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the robot */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the robot */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the robot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion path */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot associated with the path */,
  "path_name" TEXT /* Name of the motion path */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the motion path */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the path started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the path ended */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the motion path */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the path (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the path */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_paths_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "path_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion path the step belongs to */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Number of the step in the path */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step (e.g., start, end, intermediate points) */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate of the step */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate of the step */,
  "z_coordinate" REAL /* Z coordinate of the step */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the step was recorded */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the robot at the step */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the robot at the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_steps_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("path_id") REFERENCES motion_paths ("path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "path_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "path_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion path */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the path */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed change log for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_path_versions_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("path_id") REFERENCES motion_paths ("path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date the next maintenance is due */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, operator, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot being accessed */,
  "path_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion path being accessed */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("path_id") REFERENCES motion_paths ("path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot */,
  "path_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion path */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., cycle time, efficiency) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, percent) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("path_id") REFERENCES motion_paths ("path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for training the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization result */,
  "path_id" INTEGER /* ID of the motion path */,
  "optimization_date" TEXT /* Date the optimization was performed */,
  "optimization_type" TEXT /* Type of optimization (e.g., speed, efficiency) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the optimization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_results_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("path_id") REFERENCES motion_paths ("path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., maintenance, optimization) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
